name: Country Tales 2: New Frontiers Collector's Edition
short_description: Join the new sheriff in town, forge strong friendships and explore the Wild West in this fun and dynamic time management strategy game! Enjoy in dozens of unique levels, bonus levels, medals and collectables; build, upgrade, trade, collect, clear the road, explore and much more...
detailed_description:
Enter the Wild West in Country Tales 2: New Frontiers (Collector’s Edition) — a colorful time-management city-builder strategy game where you build towns, explore new frontiers, gather resources, trade, clear roads and stop a dastardly villain from taking over the West.

A new sheriff is in town — Harriet — but she’s not alone: Colonel Gross is plotting to seize control. Join Harriet and a cast of quirky characters, help townsfolk, uncover plans and defend your settlements across dozens of handcrafted levels.

🎯 Dozens of levels packed with city building fun

🏰 Build, upgrade, and defend your towns

⚡ Use powerful boosts & unlock achievements

🎧 Intriguing narrative — a plot with twists and memorable characters.

🛠️ 3 difficulty levels – from relaxed exploration to true challenge.

📴 Play completely offline — anytime, anywhere

🔒 No data collection — your privacy is safe

🕹 Gameplay

Click / Tap to gather resources, build houses, manage workers, and keep your people thriving as you progress through each level. Use boosts when things get tough — but the real reward is mastering strategy and efficiency!

🎮 Play your way

Expand, optimize, upgrade, and develop your settlements the way you like. Customizable challenge — Relaxed, Standard, and Extreme difficulty modes. Earn Achievements as you complete objectives and perfect your strategy.

🌌 Immersive adventure

The mix of colorful art, atmosphere, and story-rich progression paired with satisfying time-management and city-building mechanics. Whether you enjoy calm, casual resource gathering or intense strategic challenges — this game delivers both.

This COLLECTOR'S EDITION version contains some special features:

  • Bonus levels - Clear the Road style levels - Free City Build mode

  • Additional achievements

    -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

  • JOIN the new sheriff in town, forge new friendships and explore the Wild West

  • DOZENS of unique levels, bonus levels, medals and collectables to win

  • BUILD, upgrade, trade, collect, clear the road, explore and much more...

  • 3 DIFFICULTY MODES: Relaxed, Timed, and Extreme; each one with unique challenges, bonuses, and achievements

  • USE BOOSTERS on levels to help you reach your goals

  • STEP BY STEP tutorials for beginners

  • COLLECTOR'S EDITION includes: 20 bonus levels and additional achievements

  • GORGEOUS high definition visuals and animations
